diagrams.title: 1D Array Memory Representation
diagrams.description: Shows how elements are stored contiguously in memory with indices
diagrams.purpose: Understanding contiguous memory allocation and indexing

diagrams.title: 2D Array Row-Major vs Column-Major
diagrams.description: Compares how 2x3 matrix is stored in memory for row-major and column-major
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing different storage schemes for 2D arrays

diagrams.title: Dynamic Array Resizing Mechanism
diagrams.description: Shows how dynamic array doubles capacity when full
elements: Initial capacity: 4, elements fill all slots
Copy all 4 elements to new array
diagrams.purpose: Understanding automatic resizing in dynamic arrays like Vector/ArrayList

diagrams.title: Sparse Matrix Triplet Representation
diagrams.description: Shows compact storage of sparse matrix with only non-zero elements
elements: Saves significant memory for large sparse matrices
